title: MAROLOP OLOP HITA ON
lyrics:
1
Marolop olop hita on mamuji Tuhani
Asina i dilehon do,holong rohana i
Marhite pandidion on di janghon jolma i
Tuhangoluan natongtong sisalelengna i
2
Ai nunga di pabalibe sibolis setani
Disesa nang dosanta i ias tondinta i
Gabe anakna hita on marhite Kristus i
Ai Debatado Ama i parholong bolon i
3
ai nunga mate Kristusi humonghop jolmai
Margogodo mudarnai pahehe sasude
malua hajolmaoni dibahen silangi
Imanado rajanta i nuaeng nang sogotpe
4
nang tondi porbadia i nasian ginjangi
Dilehondo tuhitaon nadiportibion
Mamboan hatiuroni nang hagogooni
anggiat sahat hitaon tu hatuaoni
